faqs.question: What does rodent proofing include in Cedarhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rodent proofing service includes a thorough inspection of your Cedarhurst property, sealing all entry points with steel wool, copper mesh, and commercial-grade sealants, installing door sweeps and vent covers, securing foundation gaps, and providing detailed recommendations for ongoing prevention.

faqs.question: Why do Cedarhurst homes need rodent proofing?
faqs.answer: Cedarhurst's proximity to parks, mature landscaping, and Long Island's coastal environment creates ideal conditions for rodent activity year-round. Rodent proofing prevents mice and rats from entering your home, protecting your family's health, preventing property damage, and avoiding costly repairs from chewed wiring and insulation.

faqs.question: How much does rodent proofing cost in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Rodent proofing services in Cedarhurst typically range from $500 to $3,000, depending on your home's size, construction type, number of entry points, and severity of vulnerabilities. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes so you know exactly what to expect before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing last?
faqs.answer: Professional rodent proofing using quality materials typically lasts 5-10 years or longer when properly maintained. We use durable, weather-resistant materials designed to withstand Long Island's climate conditions, and we back our work with warranties to ensure your Cedarhurst home stays rodent-free.
